title: Kill Host Node Process Running Outside Docker
acceptance_criteria: Host Node.js process PID 86471 is killed and not respawning
Docker container is the only running instance (confirmed via docker ps)
Only one Node.js process is listening on port 4321
Application is still accessible at http://localhost:4321 after kill
deliverables: VPS: killed duplicate Node.js host process PID 86471
completion_summary: Killed host Node process PID 86471 out of Docker
